name: Amumu

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Cursed Touch
passive.description_source: Innate:  Amumu's basic attacks and  Curse of the Sad Mummy mark enemies with Curse.  Despair will refresh ongoing Curse marks on enemies hit.

effects.description: Innate: Amumu's basic attacks and Curse of the Sad Mummy are empowered to mark enemies with Curse for 3 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and Despair's per-tick damage.
Cursed targets receive 10% bonus true damage from all incoming pre-mitigation magic damage.

passive.description: Innate: Amumu's basic attacks and Curse of the Sad Mummy are empowered to mark enemies with Curse for 3 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and Despair's per-tick damage.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): If the triggering basic attack from Amumu applies magic damage on-hit, Curse will be applied before the magic damage.

basic_ability_1.name: Bandage Toss
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Amumu throws a bandage that deals magic damage and  stuns the first enemy hit while he  dashes to them.

effects.context_notes: Active: Amumu throws a bandage in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit, stunning them for 1 second and pulling him to them, during which they are revealed.

effects.description: Amumu periodically stocks a Bandage Toss charge, up to a maximum of 2.
Despair can be cast during the dash.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Amumu throws a bandage in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit, stunning them for 1 second and pulling him to them, during which they are revealed.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Amumu will track the target if they change locations.

basic_ability_2.name: Despair
basic_ability_2.description_source: Toggle:  Amumu begins crying, continually dealing magic damage to nearby enemies based on their maximum health.

effects.context_notes: Toggle: Amumu cries a continuous pool of tears, dealing magic damage every 0.

basic_ability_2.description: Toggle: Amumu cries a continuous pool of tears, dealing magic damage every 0.5 seconds to nearby enemies.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Toggle abilities do not count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.

basic_ability_3.name: Tantrum
basic_ability_3.description_source: Passive:  Amumu gains damage reduction against physical damage.  Tantrum's cooldown is reduced whenever he is hit by a  basic attack.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Amumu reduces every instance of pre-mitigation physical damage taken, capped at 50% of the damage instance.
Active: Amumu releases his anger, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies.

effects.description: Tantrum's current cooldown is reduced by 0.75 seconds whenever Amumu is hit by a basic attack on-hit.

basic_ability_3.description: Passive: Amumu reduces every instance of pre-mitigation physical damage taken, capped at 50% of the damage instance.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): A basic attack's basic damage and each on-hit effect are all separate damage instances, and may be reduced each if they deal physical damage.

ultimate.name: Curse of the Sad Mummy
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Amumu entangles nearby enemies in bandages, dealing magic damage as well as briefly  knocking down and  stunning them.

effects.context_notes: Active: Amumu entangles nearby enemies in bandages, dealing magic damage as well as knocking them down and stunning them for 1.

ultimate.description: Active: Amumu entangles nearby enemies in bandages, dealing magic damage as well as knocking them down and stunning them for 1.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
